sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the root עוּף No. 3)-

(1) darkness. Amo 4:13, עֹשֶׁה שַׁחַר עֵיפָה “he makes the dawn darkness.” With ה parag. עֵפָֽתָה Job 10:22.

(2) [Ephah], pr.n.-(a) of a country and tribe of the Midianites; Arab. غَيْفَةُ Gen 25:4 Isa 60:6 1Ch 1:33.-(b) m. 1Ch 2:47.-(c) f. 1Ch 2:46.
